---
id: get-active-guardrails
title: "Get active guardrails"
description: "Get the currently active guardrails version. Returns 404 if no API guardrails have been posted — file-based guardrails are in use."
sidebar_label: "Get active guardrails"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Get active guardrails"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/guardrails"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get the currently active guardrails version. Returns 404 if no API guardrails have been posted — file-based guardrails are in use.

  parameters={undefined}
